title: Sadu Kudu Vizhiyil Lyrics Sivappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Sadu Kudu Vizhiyil
Movie: Sivappu
Singer:
Music: N.R. Ragunanthan
Lyrics: Kabilanvairamuthu

Sadu kudu vizhiyil
sudugira mayakkam.
en vidukadhai iravil
vidivadhai marakkum.

porakkala boomi veesi aerindha
pookkalill ondru pesiyadhindru

unnai saaitha pallangalai
niraivaaga moodugiren
en manadhoram nadandhu vara
oru vazhi chaalai podugiren

uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi
uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi

sadu kudu vizhiyil
sudugira mayakkam.
en vidukadhai iravil
vidivadhai marakkum.

Maaya penmaye thaedi thaediye
unnai theeyil thalliye maraindheney
Kangal kandadhoru eera kaatchiyaal
mandai narambugal nanaidheney

Agadhi koodaaram kadandhu vandhu
en sagadhi manaveliyil vilundhaaye
sagadhi manaveliyai pullveliyaakki
sidharum pookkalaai nadandhaaye

Eera dhevadhai vazha vazhave
thooya paavangal naan puriven
vidiyal keetrinil visirigal seidhu
adimai kaayangal aatriduven

uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi
uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi

Paavai munnerum paadhai engilum
paavi muttkalai polindheney
kaalam paanaadhu kavidhaii ondrai
kappal seidhida ninaindheney

vaanam maaligaithaan anuppiya
motha garvam ena molindheyney
Chinna kudisaiyil olindhukidakkum
uththa santhangal ariyeney

Naanariyaamal en siru meesai
undhan vaasalil mandiyidum
ennai ketkaamal en kudai
unaiyum unaiyum ulladakkum

uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi
uyirin kanigal unadhadi
un kanneer thuligal enadhadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of the heart.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sivappu, this song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and the struggles that come with it.

Who is the music director of this song?

The music for Sadu Kudu Vizhiyil is composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 9, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sadu Kudu Vizhiyil, the protagonist navigates the complexities of love, as portrayed in the movie Sivappu. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and yearning. It beautifully captures the essence of romantic emotions, making it a perfect backdrop for moments of reflection. The heartfelt delivery resonates deeply, leaving listeners enchanted and contemplative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sadu Kudu Vizhiyil from Sivappu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With N. R. Raghunanthan's enchanting composition, this song evokes deep emotions that resonate with listeners. Experience the magic of this heartfelt track that beautifully intertwines lyrics and music.
stanzaMeanings: A mesmerizing illusion is happening in my eyes. My escape story will forget the light in my dreams.
In the land where flowers bloom, one of them is speaking.
I am closing the doors to the songs that have captured you, and I am showing a way for my heart to come back.
Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it. Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it.
A mesmerizing illusion is happening in my eyes. My escape story will forget the light in my dreams.
Searching for the magical woman, I have thrown you into the fire and lost you. With the sight of my eyes, I have become a fool.
Crossing the bridge, you have come to my heart, and you have turned my heart into a beautiful garden.
I will give the purest offerings to the divine, and I will make offerings of my life, spreading the light of dawn.
Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it. Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it.
If the path ahead is blocked, I will break through like a pearl. I have thought of a way to create poetry that will not fade away.
The sky is filled with pride, and I am lost in the small house. I do not know the joys that come with it.
Without knowing, my little mustache will be lost at your doorstep. Without hearing me, your umbrella will also be lost.
Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it. Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it.
A mesmerizing illusion is happening in my eyes. My escape story will forget the light in my dreams.
In the land where flowers bloom, one of them is speaking.
I am closing the doors to the songs that have captured you, and I am showing a way for my heart to come back.
Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it. Your eyes are the essence of my life, your tears are also part of it.
